MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-22-2026 IN 206, LAWRENCE MANN ESQ. APPEARANCE FOR PLAINTIFF; MICHAEL LIEBERMAN ESQ. APPEARANCE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL AND TO SET NEW CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS HEARD. THE CURRENT TRIAL DATE OF 6-1-26 IS VACATED AND A NEW CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS SET FOR 6-24-26 IN DEPT 610 AT 10:30 AM. THE COURT TO SEND NOTICE. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: ROCHELLE EAST, CLERK: V WU, NOT REPORTED (D206)
